tagline: Taste the sweet before it stings.
liner: This high-octane Dancehall anthem juxtaposes seductive allure with dangerous toxicity. Driven by a sharp Afro-Caribbean riddim at blistering speed, the track features chest-rattling overdriven 808s and piercing siren FX. Sultry female vocals trade rapid-fire call-and-response toasts against raw male delivery, painting a picture of lovers who are as sweet as honey but lethal like venom. It captures the gritty, sweaty energy of a peak-time club night where physical desire clashes with emotional peril under strobe lights.
worldCaption: A neon-drenched sound system culture explosion blending sultry allure, aggressive toasting, and chaotic feverish desire within a toxic roman

bios.lead: Sets the sultry tone for every drop.
bios.back: Layers depth behind the main vocal hook.
bios.drums: Keeps the floor shaking hard and fast.
bios.perc: Adds sharp, rhythmic accents to the mix.
bios.synth: Weaves atmospheric textures through the beat.
bios.other: Sprinkles gritty grit over the whole vibe.
